---
title: "Example with 'panel_data' object"
format: html
---

## Set up

```{r}
library(bamboo)
```

## Data import

```{r}
data(production)
production <- make_panel(production, index = c("firm", "year"))
```

## Panel data structure analysis

```{r}
describe_dimensions(production)
```

```{r}
describe_balance(production)
```

```{r}
describe_periods(production)
```

```{r}
plot_periods(production)
```

```{r}
describe_patterns(production)
```

```{r}
plot_patterns(production)
```

## Missing values analysis

```{r}
plot_missing(production)
```

```{r}
summarize_missing(production)
```

```{r}
describe_incomplete(production)
```

## Numeric variables analysis

```{r}
summarize_numeric(production)
```

```{r}
summarize_numeric(production, group = "year")
```

```{r}
plot_heterogeneity(production, select = "sales")
```

```{r}
decompose_numeric(production)
```

## Factor variables analysis

```{r}
decompose_factor(production)
```

```{r}
summarize_transition(production, select = "industry")
```
